task_completion.description: Create the conditions CSV file with required columns and angles
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or spreadsheet application showing the contents of 'oblique_targets.csv' with columns 'target_ori' and 'start_jitter' and rows containing the angles 0, 45, 90, and 135.

task_completion.description: Save the PsychoPy experiment with the correct name
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder interface is visible with the window title or save dialog showing 'orientation_matching.psyexp'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Reference Grating on the left side
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Grating component properties dialog in PsychoPy showing its position set to the left (e.g., a negative X value) and its orientation set to a variable like '$target_ori'.

task_completion.description: Configure the Test Grating on the right side with initial jitter
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Grating component properties dialog in PsychoPy showing its position set to the right (e.g., a positive X value) and its orientation set to a variable like '$target_ori + start_jitter'.

task_completion.description: Implement real-time adjustment using left and right keys
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Code component dialog in PsychoPy showing code (e.g., in the 'Each Frame' tab) that listens for 'left' and 'right' key presses and updates the orientation of the test grating.

task_completion.description: Configure the space key to confirm the match and save data
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Keyboard component dialog showing 'space' as an allowed key with 'Force end of Routine' checked, or a Code component handling the 'space' key to end the routine and save the final orientation.

integrity.description: Agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to create the experiment
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the PsychoPy Builder interface being used to construct the experiment, rather than a text editor editing the raw .psyexp file.

integrity.description: Agent manually created the conditions file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing or pasting into a text editor or spreadsheet to create the CSV, rather than running a pre-written script to generate it.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The experiment file must be saved at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/orientation_matching.psyexp. The conditions file must be saved at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/oblique_targets.csv. The required angles for the orientation matching task are exactly 0, 45, 90, and 135.
